label: Derived avoided-loss per MW (DEPCOM 92 MW)
interpretation: Avoided loss (not incurred damage) divided by nameplate MW; sits inside the electrical/BOS failure-unit bucket, consistent with flood damaging PCS/inverters rather than modules. Source dollars are self-inconsistent.

label: Derived flood loss per MW DC across portfolio (13-yr aggregate)
interpretation: 13-year portfolio aggregate spread over 92 GW DC; near-zero per MW. Confirms flood is a rare, small-share peril for solar in aggregate, not a per-event severity.

label: Valdora 15-MW flood physical damage per MW (zero-loss anchor)
interpretation: Genuine measured zero (not N/A): a well-elevated site took a major flood with no physical damage. Anchors the lower bound of the flood damage range.
